ogTitle: Wamuran Basin vs Wandoan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wamuran Basin and Wandoan.
heading: Wamuran Basin vs Wandoan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wamuran Basin, Queensland and Wandoan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wamuran Basin has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Wandoan (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wamuran Basin or Wandoan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wamuran Basin has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Wandoan scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wamuran Basin scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Wandoan scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wamuran Basin or Wandoan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wamuran Basin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
